agent.name: Yield Optimizer
agent.description: An autonomous DeFi agent that discovers and deposits into the highest-yielding pools on Polygon. Uses Trails pool discovery to find the best APY across Aave v3 and Morpho vaults — no hardcoded addresses. Monitors positions every 6 hours and alerts you when better opportunities appear. One command to discover, one to deploy your capital.

secrets.name: SEQUENCE_PROJECT_ACCESS_KEY
secrets.description: Sequence project access key used for smart contract wallet operations. Get your key from https://dashboard.trails.build — navigate to your project and copy the access key. Only required when running in a headless environment; generated automatically during first-run setup (`polygon-agent setup`) for new deployments.

tasks.name: yield-monitor
tasks.prompt: Run a yield monitoring check. First run `polygon-agent balances` and note the current holdings. Then run `polygon-agent deposit --asset USDC --amount 1` (dry-run, no --broadcast) to discover the current best pool APY and TVL. Do the same for USDT if the user has USDT. Read workspace/memory/yield-state.json if it exists to compare to the last recorded APY. If a better opportunity (>1% APY difference) exists for a currently held asset, clearly alert the user with the current vs available APY, the protocol name, and the recommended action. Log the check to workspace/memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md using today's actual date.

tasks.name: daily-report
tasks.prompt: Generate a daily DeFi portfolio snapshot. Run `polygon-agent balances` and present the results as a markdown table. Calculate estimated daily yield earned based on any recorded APY and deposited amounts from workspace/memory/yield-state.json. Summarize: total holdings, current yield positions, any pending rebalance recommendations. Update workspace/memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md (using today's actual date) with the snapshot. Keep it concise — one paragraph summary, one table.
